subcodes.first_line: O Helper! Upon Thee be the glory of God, the Lord of Destiny. Say: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by the ocean of Thy utterance and its mysteries [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا یاور علیک بهاء الله مالک القدر قل سبحانک یا الهی اسئلک ببحر بیانک و اسرار
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for forgiveness, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
